summary: Adventure chunk from Into the Outdoors with Gun and Camera page 114, chunk 5.

source_text.source_title: Into the Outdoors with Gun and Camera

mechanics.raw_text:
Peter (innocently): Surely you must have ‘misremembered, my comments, ‘ois-R-USS1: Perhaps we might review the Security surveillance tapes to clarify this un- fortunate dispute. Peters (Thoughtful, then cheerful and coop- erative): An excellent suggestion, citizen, But there is no reason to waste the time of these other citizens while we perform this tedious chore, The rest of you are dismissed. Tois-R-USS-1 and | will review the tapes ourselves. GM as Narrator: You other PCs are hustled ‘out and sent back to your quarters, leav- ing Peter- and Tois-R-USS-1 to review the tapes. Time passes, Soon you receive another summons to the briefing. room, ‘Another Red. Troubleshooter is there ‘waiting for you, He looks quite familiar Peter: The slanderous, treasonous lies of “ois R-USS-1 have been amply demon- strated by a review of the surveillance tapes, and | am pleased to inform you that this traitor has been reassigned. (Significant pause.) However, | congratulate the group 6m its good fortune in having Tois-R-USS-2 —a Troubleshooter with unquestionable loyalties — join them on this mission. Closing the Briefing 
Don’t let the PCs talk themselves to death, ‘even if they seem to be enjoying it. Peter- quickly tires of the jabber and wants to get back to work. When Peter gets up to leave, everyone should understand that they're dis- missed. Persistence is rewarded with patient tolerance, a request fora private conference, and a swift offstage execution. When the briefing is over, Peter's final act is to hand Grund-G a pile of documents and direct him to take command of his mission group.
